---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new tool, new behavior, or new upstream source
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- The research workflow or pain point you're trying to address. Concrete
example queries are far more useful than abstract descriptions. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the new tool / behavior look like? If you're proposing a
new tool, sketch its name, input schema, and output schema. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways you've thought about solving the same problem, and why
this one is preferred. -->

## Scope checks

- [ ] I've read [`ROADMAP_v0.4.md`](../../ROADMAP_v0.4.md) and confirmed
      this isn't already planned for an upcoming release.
- [ ] If this adds or renames a tool, I understand that the README and
      `tests/test_doc_drift.py` invariants will need to be updated in
      the same change.
- [ ] If this adds a new upstream source, I've checked the source's
      terms of service and rate limits.

## Additional context

<!-- Citations to the upstream API docs, links to similar features in
other tools, references to neuroimaging methodology, etc. -->
